title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, King Harald, Hajrudin, Usopp, Unknown person #11, Loki as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now let's see what kind of garbage we'll be serving up today..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAH! The horse of fortune died!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The steward's body was in the realm of the dead!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: This is a disaster!! King Harald's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...already left on his voyage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They're coming!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Close the doors and get the children inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: 48 YEARS BEFORE PRESENT DAY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The villages drew closer in terms of trade and identity and the nation stood together.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My dream is to join hands with many other countries around the planet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the giant race to be welcome all over this grand world!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald's so cool!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's changed so much, he's gonna be a king who will go down in history!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Well, well, you look thrilled, hajrudin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it "cause you're illegitimate? Prince low is the true heir, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're just an illegitimate throw-away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Beat 'em all up, guys!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This is Elbaf, the world's strongest country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We don't need weaklings here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Loki, driven by scorn, unleashed chaos onto Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He laughed at the feeble as they ran.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, Lok!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dad went through hell to rebuild this village!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! You think you get to call my father dad?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I don't get why everyone respects him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's dumb for trying to play nice with those human insects.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's crap!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should all try to see from each other's perspectives!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't get cocky just because you're big!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being cocky is my right! I'm the prince!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ARGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare talk back to me, runt!!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hajrudin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay back, Gerd, He'll think you're his friend!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Loki will hit you next.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We are His friends, you dummy!!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hajrudin!!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hajrudin!!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hajrudin, are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He needs first aid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha ha ha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: You're so pathetic, I could puke, hajrudini!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just a group of weakings huddling together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's 'cause of your mom's flWhy blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...and destructive- lion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Young Master, that's going too far!! He's still the son of the King!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's also a PRN--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't call him a prince!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: LOKI SPREAD PAIN...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But nothing he did filled the hole in his own heart...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Smash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: SNGH... HIC...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I can't even die...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 54 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
